---
name: Major Bug Report
about: Create a report for a critical issue or major bug
title: '[CRITICAL] '
labels: gssoc, gssoc:approved, level:advanced, type:bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the major bug is and how it affects the application.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console logs/tracebacks to help explain the problem.

## Environment:
 - OS: [e.g. Windows, Ubuntu]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox]
 - Python Version: [e.g. 3.10]
 - Flask Version: [e.g. 2.0.1]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
